name: National Steel and Agro Industries Limited
summary: National Steel and Agro Industries Limited engages in steel, and power businesses primarily in India. The company provides flat steel products, such as cold rolled coil, galvanized corrugated sheets, color coil, pre-painted profile sheets, etc. Its steel products are used for construction, household, transport, and industry/miscellaneous applications. The company also exports its products. National Steel and Agro Industries Limited was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Indore, India.
